heading: Designation of liaison office of Department of State
label: 1001 Designation of liaison office of Department of State
text: The Secretary of State shall designate a liaison office within the Department of State to assist the Secretary, as appropriate, in negotiating cargo security-related international agreements.
notes: Rule of ConstructionNothing in this section to be construed to affect the authorities, functions, or capabilities of the Coast Guard to perform its missions or the requirement under that those authorities, functions, and capabilities be maintained intact, see , set out as a note under .section 468 of this titlesection 301(c) of Pub. L. 109–347section 239 of this title
